html:
The Guardian's Horn is an item dropped by Ancient Guardian, which is found in the Ruins. The horn can be used to craft a Houndius Shootius.

It is similar to the Deerclops Eyeball: it does not spoil, drains the same amount of Sanity when eaten, restores the same amount of Health and Hunger when eaten, and is dropped by a boss mob.

As it is a Meat item, Pigs and Spiders will try to eat a Guardian's Horn, and Bunnymen will be hostile to players carrying it in their inventory.

The Guardian's Horn is an item dropped by Ancient Guardian, which is found in the Ruins. The horn can be used to craft a Houndius Shootius.
It is similar to the Deerclops Eyeball: it does not spoil, drains the same amount of Sanity when eaten, restores the same amount of Health and Hunger when eaten, and is dropped by a boss mob.
As it is a Meat item, Pigs and Spiders will try to eat a Guardian's Horn, and Bunnymen will be hostile to players carrying it in their inventory.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Sừng Người Bảo Vệ là một vật phẩm rơi ra từ Người Bảo Vệ Cổ Đại, được tìm thấy trong Tàn Tích. Sừng có thể được sử dụng để chế tạo Houndius Shootius.

The '''Guardian's Horn''' is an [[item]] dropped by [[Ancient Guardian]], which is found in the [[Ruins]]. The horn can be used to craft a [[Houndius Shootius]].

It is similar to the [[Deerclops Eyeball]]: it does not spoil, drains the same amount of [[Sanity]] when eaten, restores the same amount of [[Health]] and [[Hunger]] when eaten, and is dropped by a boss [[mob]].

As it is a [[Meat]] item, [[Pig]]s and [[:Category:Spiders|Spiders]] will try to eat a Guardian's Horn, and [[Bunnyman|Bunnymen]] will be hostile to players carrying it in their inventory.
